top_signals.title: China Tells Refiners to Keep Fuel Output High as Iran War Drags
top_signals.summary: China instructed some major refiners to keep fuel production high, according to people familiar with the matter, in an effort to protect domestic consumers as strikes in the Persian Gulf once again threaten oil shipments.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
